name: Woven and Glass Toothbrush Holder - Threshold™
description: Bring boho charm to your bathroom space with this Woven and Glass Toothbrush Holder from Threshold™. Featuring a glass tumbler held inside a woven frame with raffia-like accents, this toothbrush holder lends artistic flair to your decor. The round, open top design makes it easy to pick up and place your toothpaste, toothbrushes and other items. Place it on any flat surface in your bathroom with a coordinating woven and glass soap pump to create a beautiful setting.
